title: Lost Souls
description: Your next breath isn't guaranteed, but your arsenal can be.
body:
![Lost Souls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ec3a4c55e79d0d743ee3cf2cdcb68754ec553d.png)

---

A challenging survival modpack where you battle the elements, master technology, and fight to reclaim your place in a hostile universe.

**Survive. Adapt. Conquer.**

---

## ❄️ Your Fight for Survival Begins

Imagine waking up in a world where the cold can kill you before the monsters do. Where the scorching sun burns as fiercely as your thirst for progress.
You'll need to master temperature management, finding warmth in frozen caves and shelter from blazing deserts. Every day is a battle against nature itself.

## 🔫 Your Arsenal Awaits

When night falls or danger approaches, you'll be glad you have firepower. From tactical firearms to massive artillery, you have the tools to defend what's yours. Build tanks, suit up with advanced gear, and make your stand.

## 🚀 Your Journey to the Stars

Why stop at conquering one world? You can build rockets and explore distant planets. But first, you'll need to master transportation here on Earth - drive custom vehicles, take to the skies with aircraft, or build complex rail networks.

## 💻 Your Digital Dominion

Automation reaches new heights with programmable computers. Code systems to run your farms, manage your defenses, and control your base. Create immersive security displays and build a high-tech headquarters worthy of a survivor.

## 🏭 Your Industrial Revolution

At the heart of your progress lies complex factory automation. Design workshops that process resources automatically, generate power with advanced engines, and watch your creations bring life to your base. This isn't just survival - it's engineering mastery.

## 🌍 Your World to Explore

The world itself has been transformed. Discover breathtaking new biomes and explore completely overhauled structures. From ancient dungeons to mysterious new landscapes, every journey holds new dangers and rewards.

---

<details>
<summary>Click to view the mods</summary>

This modpack brings together the best mods from talented creators. Here are the essentials that make Lost Souls unique:

### Core Gameplay
*   [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) - Explore the solar system
*   [Automobility](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility) - Driveable vehicles
*   [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) - Programmable computers
*   [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) - Temperature survival
*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Factory automation
*   [Create Big Cannons](https://modrinth.com/mod/createbigcannons) - Massive artillery
*   [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) - Flyable planes
*   [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz) - Modern firearms
*   [War Machines](https://modrinth.com/mod/war-machines) - Tanks and combat

### Mods from other Platforms
*These mods are available on other platforms which aim to complete your experience:*
*   [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) - Enhanced storage
*   [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) - Better configuration
*   [Controllable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable) - Controller support
*   [MrCrayFish's Gun Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod-unofficial) - Advanced guns
*   [Endless Ammo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-endless-ammo) - Ammunition systems
*   [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) - Modding library
*   [Golden Hopper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golden-hopper) - Item transport
*   [Mighty Mail](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail) - Delivery systems
*   [Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) - Decoration

Many additional mods support these core experiences, from world generation to performance optimization.

</details>

---

## Before You Play

**You'll need a decent computer** - we recommend allocating at least 5-7GB of RAM for the best experience. The pack includes performance mods to help, but there's a lot of content to explore.

Lost Souls is designed for players who want more from survival - more challenge, more technology, and more adventure. If you're ready to test your skills against the elements while building toward space exploration, this is your pack.

**Ready to begin your journey? Download and see if you have what it takes to survive..**
